data.content: Shipped work/foolery-1789 to origin/main via merge commit 345d04a35395. Search now matches beat IDs with and without project prefix and bypasses state-filter narrowing during explicit search. Remote GitHub Actions passed for commit 345d04a35395: CI #23289549596 and Coverage Badge #23289549578. CI emitted non-blocking annotations for Node 20 action deprecation and a coverage-regression warning, but both workflows concluded success.
